summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Admin Admissions feature and Multi-step Checkout flow. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend admin panel shows 5 nav items including Admissions on all pages. Checkout page has 4-step process with all required form fields and document uploads.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/admin/login with correct password returns 200 with admin session
Backend: POST /api/admin/login with wrong password returns 401
Backend: POST /api/admin/login with empty password returns 401
Backend: GET /api/admin/admission-forms requires auth (returns 401 without)
Backend: GET /api/admin/admission-forms with admin session returns array
Backend: POST /api/student/upload requires auth (returns 401 without)
Backend: POST /api/admission-form requires auth (returns 401 without)
Backend: GET /api/admin/stats accessible with admin session
Backend: GET /api/admin/students accessible with admin session
Backend: GET /api/admin/enrollments accessible with admin session
Backend: GET /api/admin/courses accessible with admin session
Backend: GET /api/courses returns courses list
Backend: GET /api/courses/:id returns single course details
Frontend: Admin login page at /admin/login with password input
Frontend: Admin login with password OEC@Admin#2026!Secure works
Frontend: Admin Dashboard shows 5 nav items (Dashboard, Courses, Students, Payments, Admissions)
Frontend: Admin Courses page shows 5 nav items including Admissions
Frontend: Admin Students page shows 5 nav items including Admissions
Frontend: Admin Enrollments/Payments page shows 5 nav items including Admissions
Frontend: Admin Admissions page loads at /admin/admissions
Frontend: Admin Admissions page shows empty state message when no forms
Frontend: Checkout page at /checkout/:courseId requires authentication
Frontend: Checkout page shows 4-step process (Admission Form, Documents, Payment, Confirm)
Frontend: Checkout Step 1 has all 13 form fields (full_name, phone, dob, gender, religion, qualification, city, address, session_type, learning_type, father_name, father_phone, father_cnic)
Frontend: Checkout Step 2 has 4 document upload areas (ID front, ID back, degree, B-form)
Frontend: Checkout Step 3 has 3 payment methods (JazzCash, EasyPaisa, Bank Transfer)
Frontend: Checkout Step 3 has receipt upload area and transaction ID input
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin password auth system tested and working. Admin Admissions page at /admin/admissions shows submitted admission forms (currently empty). All admin pages have 5 nav items including Admissions. Checkout flow has 4 steps: Admission Form (13 fields), Documents (4 uploads), Payment (3 methods + receipt), Confirm. Student upload and admission form submission require Google OAuth student session. Full checkout flow submission requires student auth.

mocked_apis_list: Resend email notifications (logs to console instead of sending real emails)
